code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws(s, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      mut j = i
      while j < n and not is_ws(s, j)
        j = j + 1
      end
      let tok = string.substring(s, i, j)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        i = i
      end
      i = j
    end
  end
  result
end

fn find(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  list.index_of(xs, target)
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line1)
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line2)
    let xs = parse_ints(line1)
    match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
    when Some(target)
      match find(xs, target)
      when Some(idx)
        print("index=#{idx}")
      when None
        print("not_found")
      end
    when None
      print("not_found")
    end
  when None
    print("not_found")
  end
when None
  print("not_found")
end
